title: dendrosenecio johnstonii subsp. johnstonii
intro: Dendrosenecio johnstonii subsp. johnstonii, also known as the giant senecio, is a plant species native to Kenya and Tanzania in East Africa, characterized by its large rosettes and tall stems. Traditionally, the plant is used for its medicinal properties, which include antiseptic and anti-inflammatory effects, making it useful in treating wounds, fever, and digestive issues. The health benefits of Dendrosenecio johnstonii subsp. johnstonii include its ability to reduce pain and inflammation, improve digestion, and boost the immune system. Herbal preparations of the plant include infusions and decoctions, which can be used to treat various ailments, although its safety and efficacy should be evaluated by a healthcare professional.
